findings.title: Dependencies are locked
findings.summary: None of the expected files were found: uv.lock, poetry.lock, requirements.lock, Cargo.lock, package-lock.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, yarn.lock.
findings.remediation: Commit a lockfile or a fully pinned reproducible dependency set.

findings.title: Database migrations are versioned
findings.summary: No migration directory was detected. This may be valid for a stateless project.
findings.remediation: If the service has persistent state, add versioned migrations and rollback guidance.

findings.title: Backup and restore are documented
findings.summary: No backup or restore documentation was detected.
findings.remediation: Document and test backup/restore, including RPO and RTO expectations.

findings.title: Container build is defined
findings.summary: None of the expected files were found: Dockerfile, Containerfile.
findings.remediation: Add a deterministic container build or document the supported deployment artifact.

findings.title: Environment contract exists
findings.summary: None of the expected files were found: .env.example, .env.template, env.example.
findings.remediation: Add a secret-free .env.example documenting every required variable.

findings.title: Ownership is documented
findings.summary: None of the expected files were found: CODEOWNERS, .github/CODEOWNERS, MAINTAINERS.md, OWNERS.
findings.remediation: Document code ownership, operational owner and escalation contact.

findings.title: No oversized repository artifacts
findings.summary: No files over 20 MiB were detected.

findings.title: Health/readiness signal exists
findings.remediation: Expose health and readiness checks suitable for deployment automation.

findings.title: Structured logging evidence
findings.summary: Structured logging or request correlation was not detected.
findings.remediation: Add structured logs and request/job correlation identifiers.

findings.title: Runbook and rollback guidance
findings.summary: No runbook, rollback or incident-response guidance was detected.
findings.remediation: Document startup, shutdown, rollback, incident and escalation steps.

findings.title: Timeout/retry/idempotency evidence
findings.summary: Resilience controls are missing or weakly documented.
findings.remediation: Define timeouts, bounded retries and idempotency for side-effecting operations.

findings.title: No obvious committed secrets
findings.summary: No obvious high-confidence secrets were detected.

decision_proof.note: Calybris selected candidate 2 (action=substitute, reason=alternative_maximizes_utility). Candidate 1=ACCEPT, 2=CONDITIONAL_ACCEPTANCE, 3=REJECT. Audited policy=python-saas-v1@1, effective_risk_bps=5080.
